title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that inventing general relativity represents a final test for AI. The claim positions scientific theory invention at the boundary of AI achievement, implying that reproducing or discovering fundamental physics breakthroughs would demonstrate human-level or superhuman scientific reasoning.
